description: A braided Center Lane-shirted instructor gestures to two girls (pink goggles + pink cap) standing on the pool deck, ready to jump. The coach's arms-out 'jump to me' gesture cues the action.
Two girls stand on the pool edge making peace signs and funny faces at the camera while the braided instructor waits in the water. A playful 'getting ready to jump' scene.
A pigtailed girl in pink goggles jumps off the deck mid-air while her second friend stands behind making a peace sign. The braided instructor grins from the pool, arms ready. Pure action.
The braided instructor coaches a girl in pink goggles who is hesitantly crouched on the pool edge, deciding whether to jump. Captures the 'moment of courage' before a leap.
The same pink-goggled girl leaps off the edge toward her instructor, arms out and legs tucked. Mid-air freeze of a 'brave jump' moment.
Close vertical portrait of a small girl in a pale-pink rash guard and blue goggles standing at the pool wall, big confident smile. Looks like an ideal thumbnail for 'I can swim' content.
A braided instructor high-fives two young girls at the pool ladder in a triple-high-five celebration. Pure 'you nailed it' class energy.
Same triple-high-five from the opposite angle, the instructor laughing mid-celebration with the pink-clad girls. Incredible 'team win' photo.
Another variation of the high-five — one girl's knee up, instructor laughing. Great 'kids crushing goals' energy.
Same high-five with just two subjects in focus — the coach and a goggled girl slapping hands. Clean two-person celebration shot.
A braided instructor and a goggled girl in purple share a smiling face-to-face moment in the pool. Calm, trust-filled coaching portrait.
Same pair laughing together in the pool, deck visible above the waterline. A bright 'we love class' candid.
The braided instructor assists a small girl in pink-patterned suit and goggles, fully engaged in a supported drill. Parents can be seen in the background through the windows.
A male instructor in a Center Lane shirt lifts a goggled girl above his head while another student in purple goggles watches from the deck. Two simultaneous lesson moments in one frame.
The braided coach supports a goggled girl in a pink-cap through a float drill, clean pool benches and staff visible through the lobby glass behind them. Real-facility context.
The braided instructor supports the pink-goggled girl as she works a back-float, parents chatting on the benches beyond. A classic 'quiet breakthrough' moment.
Vertical frame of the coach and pink-goggled girl making eye contact at water level. The coach's proud face reads 'you've got this.'
Vertical frame of the coach holding the pink-goggled girl slightly above the water, both dripping and grinning. Another 'celebration after a successful drill' moment.
The instructor tosses a pink-goggled girl up in the pool, splashes framing her mid-air. A fun, dynamic 'reward throw' action shot.

Vertical portrait of a blonde toddler boy sitting on the lobby floor in sage-green, eating a cookie while holding a purple-and-green toy car. A cozy 'lobby snack' moment showing the welcoming waiting area.
